---
title: "Sir Stratford Canning"
---

## Sir Stratford Canning

**Dates:**  (1786-1880)

### Description

1st Viscount Stratford de Redcliffe, ambassador

### Biography

He married, secondly, Eliza Charlotte Alexander (d. 25 Nov 1882) He was ambassador to Constantinople 1825-9 and 1841-58. He was created a viscount in 1852. He was uncle to Emma (Barnett) Butler and first cousin once removed to Rev. W. J. Butler [<i>Complete Peerage; A.J. Butler</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 21st 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
